name: GH_DocumentIO
summary: Provides basic IO operations for GH_Documents.

constructors.name: GH_DocumentIO()
constructors.summary: Create a new instance of GH_DocumentIO without an internal document.

constructors.name: GH_DocumentIO(GH_Document)
constructors.summary: Create a new instance of GH_DocumentIO with an internal document.

methods.name: ClearClipboard
methods.summary: Clear the Clipboard Text content. This function wipes both the Text and UnicodeText clipboard fields.

methods.name: Copy(GH_ClipboardType)
methods.summary: Copy the internal document into the clipboard.

params.name: clipboard
params.doc: Specifies the clipboard type to use.

methods.name: Copy(GH_ClipboardType, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Copy(GH_ClipboardType clipboard, bool limitToSelection)
methods.summary: Copy the internal document into the clipboard.

params.name: clipboard
params.doc: Specifies the clipboard type to use.

params.name: limitToSelection
params.doc: If true, only the selected objects will be copied.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Copy(GH_ClipboardType, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public bool Copy(GH_ClipboardType clipboard, IEnumerable<Guid> guids)
methods.summary: Copy the specified objects in the internal document into the clipboard.

params.name: clipboard
params.doc: Specifies the clipboard type to use.

params.name: guids
params.doc: List of object ids to copy.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: GetDocumentIcon
methods.signature: public static Bitmap GetDocumentIcon(string filePath, Size size)
methods.summary: Try and extract the icon image of a document. Not all gh/ghx files contain an icon so this function may return null. The document itself is not loaded and rendered, so the icon really has to be part of the file already.

returns.doc: An icon bitmap on success or null on failure. Caller is responsible for disposing of the image.

methods.name: GetDocumentThumbnail
methods.summary: Try and extract the preview image of a document. Not all gh/ghx files contain a thumbnail so this function may return null. The document itself is not loaded and rendered, so the thumbnail really has to be part of the file already.

returns.doc: A preview bitmap on success or null on failure. Caller is responsible for disposing of the image.

methods.name: Open()
methods.summary: Perform a default Open operation and store the result as the internal document.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Open(String)
methods.summary: Open the file at the given location.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: Path of Grasshopper file to open.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: OpenDocumentDialog
methods.signature: public string OpenDocumentDialog(string path = null, string title = "Open…")

returns.doc: FileName specified via the Open dialog or null if the dialog was cancelled.

methods.name: Paste
methods.summary: Deserialize a Grasshopper document from the clipboard. On success, the internal document of this GH_DocumentIO instance will be set.

params.name: clipboard
params.doc: Specifies the clipboard type to use.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Save
methods.summary: Perform a default Save operation on the internal document.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SaveAs
methods.summary: Perform a default Save As operation on the internal document.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SaveAsCopyDocumentDialog
methods.summary: Display the Save As Copy GH/GHX dialog.

returns.doc: FileName specified via the Save As Copy dialog or null if the dialog was cancelled.

methods.name: SaveAsDocumentDialog
methods.summary: Display the Save As GH/GHX dialog.

returns.doc: FileName specified via the Save As dialog or null if the dialog was cancelled.

methods.name: SaveBackup
methods.summary: Save a time-stamped copy of the current file.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SaveDocumentDialog
methods.signature: public string SaveDocumentDialog(string path = null, string title = "Save…")

returns.doc: FileName specified via the Save dialog or null if the dialog was cancelled.

methods.name: SaveQuiet
methods.summary: Quietly save a file to a given location.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ShowOverwriteDialog(String, DateTime, DateTime)
methods.signature: public static int ShowOverwriteDialog(string filename, DateTime lastSave, DateTime fileOnDisk)

methods.name: SubsidiaryDocumentSavePrompt(GH_Document)
methods.summary: Display a 'stuff has changed do you want to save' message box with Yes/No/Cancel options.

returns.doc: Yes, No, Cancel or None state.

methods.name: SubsidiaryDocumentSavePrompt(String, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public static DialogResult SubsidiaryDocumentSavePrompt(string documentName, bool modified, int modifiedSubsidiaries)
methods.summary: Display a 'stuff has changed do you want to save' message box with Yes/No/Cancel options.

params.name: modified
params.doc: Boolean indicating whether top-level document is modified.

returns.doc: Yes, No, Cancel or None state.

properties.name: DisableOverwriteProtection
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the file overwrite protection dialog ought to be shown during risky saves.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Gets or sets the internal document.

properties.name: IsDocument
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this instance of GH_DocumentIO contains an internal document.
